home.title: Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta | ECAA
home.description: Building intergenerational connections and strengthening community resilience for the Ethiopian community in Atlanta.

about.title: About ECAA | Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta
about.description: Learn about ECAA's mission, history, leadership structure, and work serving Ethiopians and Ethiopian-Americans in Atlanta.

programs.title: Programs | ECAA
programs.description: Explore ECAA community support, cultural programs, youth initiatives, health and wellness, EDIR, volunteer opportunities, and education and training.

membership.title: Membership | ECAA
membership.description: Become a member of the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta and support community programs, cultural connection, and mutual support.

events.title: Events and Announcements | ECAA
events.description: Find ECAA community events, announcements, meetings, event hall rental requests, and opportunities to participate.

leadership.title: Leadership | ECAA
leadership.description: ECAA is led by community members serving through executive leadership, board roles, audit oversight, advisory support, and EDIR leadership.

documents.title: Governance & Documents | ECAA
documents.description: Access ECAA bylaws in English and Amharic, election documents, public reports, meeting notices, and organizational governance resources.

media.title: Media | ECAA
media.description: Watch ECAA videos and view community media highlights.

support.title: Donate | ECAA
support.description: Donate to support ECAA community programs, the community center, youth initiatives, and long-term growth. ECAA is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit organization.

contact.title: Contact ECAA
contact.description: Contact the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta in Stone Mountain, Georgia.

volunteer.title: Volunteer With ECAA
volunteer.description: Volunteer with the Ethiopian Community Association in Atlanta through events, education, outreach, and community support.
